title: Vanilla Enter Enhanced
description: A small mod pack to enchance the vanilla aspects of minecraft with client side mods and a light-weight shader pack.
body:
##  A light-weight fabric modpack for 1.21.8-1.21.10
This modpack includes client side modes capable on almost any system and a few resource/shader packs to brighten up a world and give it life! This modpack is made for those wanting a more close to home feeling with added fun.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/B7qPPnWwF2k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Mod List includes 📃
- 🌳 Ambient Environment (Ambient colour noise to biomes) (https://modrinth.com/user/jaredlll08)
- 🐦 Ambient Sounds (Ambient sounds in biomes) (https://modrinth.com/user/creativemd)
- 🍎 Apple Skin (Saturation/Exhaustion display) (https://modrinth.com/user/squeek502)
- 🍃 Biome Particle Weather (Particle mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/shadowmaster435)
- 💬 Chat Animation (Smooth chat animations) (https://modrinth.com/user/Ezzenix)
- 🌧️ Cool Rain (Rain animation) (https://modrinth.com/user/Jaiz)
- 💻 Dynamic Fps (Reduces resource usage while idle or in background) (https://modrinth.com/user/juliand665)
- 💻 Entity Culling (Doesn't render entities and blocks the player can't see) (https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)
- 💻 Immediately Fast (GPU optimiser) (https://modrinth.com/user/RaphiMC)
- 👁️ Iris (Shader mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot)
- 💻 Lithium (General optimisation) (https://modrinth.com/organization/caffeinemc)
- 📋 Mod Menu (Shows mods) (https://modrinth.com/organization/terraformers)
- 🙎 Not Enough Animations (Animation mod for third person) (https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)
- ✨ Particular Reforged (Water interaction mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/Leclowndu93150)
- 🧂 Reeses Sodium Options (More options for sodium) (https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese)
- 🧂 Sodium (Powerful optimisation mod) (https://modrinth.com/organization/caffeinemc)
- 🔊 Sound Physics Remastered (Adds reverberation and sound travelling) (https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax)
- 🔊 Sounds (New sounds added to items) (https://modrinth.com/user/IMB11)
- 🌊 Wakes (Water interaction mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/Goby56)
- 📷 Zoomify (Zoom mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/isxander)
- 💻 Cloth Config (Config mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/shedaniel)
- 📚 Creative Core (Library mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/creativemd)
- 🖌️ EMF/ETF (Allows for Model features like animated textures) (https://modrinth.com/user/Traben)
- 💻 Fabric API + Fabric Language Kotlin (API Mod and Allows use of Kotlin programming language for fabric mods) (https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50)
- 💻 Ferrite Core (Reduces memory usage) (https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811)
- 📚 M.R.U (Library mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/IMB11)
- 💻 Text Placeholder API (API mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/Patbox)
- 💻 Yet Another Config (Config mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/isxander)
- 🐎 Better Mount HUD (HUD mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/Lortseam)
- 💡 LambDynamicLights (Dynamic light mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/LambdAurora)
- 📚 Balm (Library mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/BlayTheNinth)
- 💻 Default Options (Option saving mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/BlayTheNinth)
- ⚒️ Easy Anvils (Anvil interaction mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/Fuzs)
- 🪖 Overflowing Bars (HUD mod) (https://modrinth.com/user/Fuzs)
- 🌾 Cut Through (Allows weapons to cut through grass) (https://modrinth.com/user/Fuzs)
- 🌾 RightClickHarvest (Crop interaction mod) (https://modrinth.com/organization/jam-core)
- 💻 JamLib (Library mod) (https://modrinth.com/organization/jam-core)
   

## Texture Packs and Shader
- 🖌️ Fresh Animations: (Brings animations to mobs) (https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)
- 🖌️ Details (More mob details)
- 🖌️ Emissive (Some mobs glow. ex drowned eyes)
- 🖌️ Extensions (Additional features for fresh animations)
- 🖌️ Spiders (Spider animation changes)
- 🖌️ Classic Horses (Horse animation changes)
- 🖌️ Creepers (Creeper animation changes)
- 🖌️ Objects (Boat, Minecart, Chest etc. changes)
- 🖌️ Quivers (Adds quivers to bow mobs)
- 🖌️ Vanilla Enter Enhanced pack (Splash text, Panorama and Title)

- 🖼️ Miniature Shader (Lightweight shader pack) (https://modrinth.com/user/ukrech)

## For Fresh Animation texture packs please add all addons to Fresh Animations *UNDER* Fresh Animations 
![Fresh Animations combinations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fb82891d03de4f7803e12bac3ec525ee850dc4b.png)
